About Me

Engineering with purpose.

I'm a Mechanical Engineering student at Bajaj Institute of Technology (DBATU) with a strong foundation in CAD tools, CFD simulation, and automotive systems.

My work sits at the intersection of classical mechanical engineering and modern computational tools — from building Navier-Stokes solvers in Python to designing ML-driven ergonomics systems in Fusion 360.

I bring initiative, analytical thinking, and a hunger to solve real engineering problems at the system level.

Work

Projects

01

CFD — Dual-Cylinder Flow Simulation

Python NumPy Matplotlib Google Colab
  • Built a 2D incompressible Navier–Stokes solver from first principles implementing full viscous flow and time-dependent wake dynamics.
  • Simulated flow around two circular cylinders at Re ≈ 200 — visualized vortex shedding and wake interaction with vorticity and velocity-field plots.
  • Validated flow patterns against classical CFD behaviour; results hosted in an accessible Colab notebook.
02

Radiator Performance Tester — Thermal & Airflow Analysis

Python Heat Transfer CFD
  • Developed a Python-based program running 50,000 iterations per condition to compute radiator cooling effectiveness across airflow speeds from 0 to 150 km/h.
  • Evaluated coolant temperature drop and air-side heat transfer while analyzing airflow behavior across varying environments.
  • Studied the effect of ambient temperature and airflow velocity on overall cooling efficiency.
03

ML-Based Driver Height Prediction & Seat Ergonomics

Python Mediapipe Regression Fusion 360
  • Built a machine-learning system using Mediapipe to extract anthropometric keypoints from a single image and estimate driver height.
  • Applied a regression model to convert height into ergonomic seat height and steering-wheel distance parameters.
  • Designed and parameterized the car-seat model in Fusion 360, integrating ML-driven analysis with CAD-based ergonomic validation.
04

CNC Machined Part Inspection System

WIZER Machine Vision Baumer Camera Python Excel Dashboard Industry 4.0
  • Configured WIZER — a no-code industrial machine vision platform — on a Baumer industrial camera to perform automated real-time surface defect detection on CNC machined steel parts (scratches, cracks, inclusions, pitting, crazing).
  • Trained the defect detection module using 50–100 reference images of defect-free parts, building a statistical surface model; tuned sensitivity thresholds to balance detection accuracy against false-positive rate.
  • Integrated a Python-based data logging module that reads WIZER output and records defect type, location, confidence score, and Accept/Reject verdict into a structured Excel workbook with a live inspection dashboard.
  • Delivered a fully deployable, no-code inspection station suitable for CNC machining workshops under Industry 4.0 quality requirements — requiring no deep learning expertise to operate or maintain.
05

Mitsubishi PLC-Based Automated Bottling Plant

Mitsubishi PLC HMI Ladder Logic GX Works Sensors & Actuators
  • Designed and implemented a fully automated bottling plant using a Mitsubishi PLC integrated with HMI, proximity/photoelectric sensors, solenoid valves, timers, counters, and a conveyor system.
  • Programmed ladder logic for automated bottle detection, conveyor control, timed solenoid filling, pneumatic feed-separator control, and post-fill bottle counting using diffuse sensors.
  • Implemented PLC arithmetic function blocks to calculate total bottles filled, remaining batch quantity, and average bottles per cycle — all displayed in real time on the HMI.
  • Achieved uniform filling, accurate counting, and safe operation with minimal human intervention — improving production accuracy, cycle time, and operator safety.

Training & Experience

BEST Bajaj Engineering Skill Training Centre

MODULE 1
Industrial Automation & Electrical Systems
Hydraulics · Pneumatics · Electro-Pneumatics · Industrial Sensors · Induction Motors · Transformers
  • Completed hands-on training covering Hydraulics, Pneumatics, Electro-Hydraulics, Electro-Pneumatics, Industrial Sensors, Induction Motors, and Transformers.
  • Built hydraulic/pneumatic circuits, wired electro-pneumatic systems, and configured sensor-based PLC control logic.
  • Performed load, speed, and direction analysis on induction motors and transformer setups.
MODULE 2
Motion Control & Sensor Technology
PLC / CNC / HMI · Servo Motors & Drives · PID Control · Digital Communications · Industrial Instrumentation
  • Configured and programmed Mitsubishi PLC and HMI; performed CNC part programming on Siemens 828D and 808D advanced CNC kits.
  • Parametrized servo motor/VFD drives and configured position feedback using encoders and linear scales on Fanuc and Mitsubishi trainer kits.
  • Set up Keyence, Pepper & Fuchs industrial sensors for object detection and machine health monitoring; applied selection criteria for sensor interfaces.
  • Operated Festo MPS PA204 smart sensor stations with PID controllers on MATLAB and LABVIEW; analysed the effect of PID parameter variation on process control.
  • Performed power quality, harmonics, and electrical signal measurements using smart workbench, industrial network kit, and QC20-W ball bar / XL80 laser calibration systems.
MODULE 4
Industry 4.0 & Smart Manufacturing
IoT · Artificial Intelligence · Machine Learning · Computer Vision · AR/VR · MES · CIM
  • Configured IoT devices (Raspberry Pi, Arduino, RFID, UWB Beacons) for M2M communications, data acquisition, cloud sharing, and real-time monitoring alerts.
  • Applied AI/ML techniques for defect detection, acoustic inspection, and model identification using GPU servers, Prolog simulation software, and PTC/PLM tools.
  • Built vision-based systems for defect detection and part presence/orientation inspection using vision cameras, Python, and Vuforia Studio.
  • Developed AR/VR modules with Studio Max and Solid Edge 3D for assembly guidance, remote troubleshooting, and training applications.
  • Studied MES applications (line tracking, zero changeover, flexible lines) and CIM concepts (AGV routing, FMS, CAPP, 3D printing, robot simulation with ROBODK).
